task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient dashboard for Olen Bayer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenMRS patient dashboard with the name 'Olen Bayer' visible in the patient header.
Screenshot shows the 'Programs' tab, widget, or section within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Select the 'HIV Care and Treatment' program
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the details or management view specifically for the 'HIV Care and Treatment' program enrollment.

task_completion.description: Initiate editing for the 'Treatment Status' workflow
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a modal, form, or dropdown opened to edit or transition the 'Treatment Status' workflow (previously set to 'Pre-ART').

task_completion.description: Change the workflow state to 'On ART' effective today
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows 'On ART' selected as the new state in the dropdown/input field, and the transition date is set to the current date.

task_completion.description: Save the state transition without completing the program
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the saved program dashboard with 'Treatment Status' now displaying 'On ART'. The program must still appear as 'Active' or enrolled (no completion or exit date).

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMRS graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with the OpenMRS SPA interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use the browser developer console to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Console, Network tab) are not open and being used to send direct API requests to transition the state.

integrity.description: Agent did not complete or exit the program
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking 'Complete Program', 'Exit Program', or filling out a program completion outcome form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Olen Bayer. Program Name: HIV Care and Treatment. Workflow: Treatment Status. Previous State: Pre-ART. Target State: On ART. The agent must successfully transition the patient's Treatment Status to 'On ART' using today's date, and the program must remain active (not completed or exited).
